name: agent-index-core
description: Core infrastructure for the agent-index system. Provides session management, member bootstrap, org setup, preferences management, and the system tutorial. v3.0.2: ships canonical CLAUDE.md template with marketplace aliases broken out and an explicit catch-all alias-resolution procedure so unknown @ai: aliases get resolved against installed collections instead of being treated as invalid. v3.0.1: member-bootstrap now documents paste-URL-back as the primary OAuth flow for sandboxed environments. v3.0.0: replaced MCP server and bridge with on-demand executor (aifs-exec).
author: agent-index
